Support, Attack, Melee
Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills are more capable of Stunning Enemies the closer you are to being Heavily Stunned.
Dauntless
Support, Conditional
Supports Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills cannot be used unless you have been stationary for a certain duration, but deal increasingly more damage the longer you are stationary. Cannot support Skills which have a cooldown or another usage Condition.
Magnetic Remnants
Support
Supports Skills which create Remnants, allowing those Remnants to be collected from further away.
Ancestral Call I
Support, Attack, Melee, Strike
Supports Strikes you use yourself, providing a powerful Ancestral Boost every few seconds. Cannot Support Channelled Skills and does not modify Skills used by Minions.
Ancestral Call II
Support, Attack, Melee, Strike
Supports Strikes you use yourself, providing a powerful Ancestral Boost every few seconds. Cannot Support Channelled Skills and does not modify Skills used by Minions.
Ancestral Call III
Support, Attack, Melee, Strike
Supports Strikes you use yourself, providing a powerful Ancestral Boost every second, at the cost of a damage penalty. Cannot Support Channelled Skills and does not modify Skills used by Minions.
Quill Burst
Support, Attack, AoE, Melee, Trigger, Physical
Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills trigger Quill Burst, which deals your Thorns Damage in an Area around the target struck. Quill Burst can only be triggered on Hit after you've Retaliated with Thorns Damage.
Unsteady Tempo
Support, Attack, Melee
Supports Melee Attack Skills you use yourself. Attacking with Supported Skills will cycle through various effects, with the first Attack in sequence inflicting Hobble on you. The second and third Attacks in sequence will powerfully scale chance to Critically Hit and overall damage, respectively, at which point the cycle will reset. Cannot Support Channelling Skills.
Ancestral Aid
Support, Attack, Melee, Strike, Conditional
Supports Strikes you use yourself. Supported Skills cannot be used until you have Blocked a certain number of Hits, but will be Ancestrally Boosted when used. After use, this Blocked Hit counter will reset. Cannot Support Channelled Skills or Skills which already have a Condition for use.
[DNT-UNUSED] Titanic Arrows
Support, AoE, Trigger, Physical
[DNT-UNUSED] Supports Bow Attacks which impact the ground, triggering stunning novas when they do.
Shocking Leap
Support, AoE, Duration
Supports Skills that leap into the air and deal damage, causing them to create Shocked Ground the first time they Critically Hit an enemy.
Barbs I
Support, Attack, Melee, Strike
Supports Melee Strike Skills. After you Retaliate with Thorns Damage, you also deal your Thorns damage to enemies you Hit with Supported Skills.
Barbs II
Support, Attack, Melee, Strike
Supports Melee Strike Skills. After you Retaliate with Thorns Damage, you also deal your Thorns damage to enemies you Hit with Supported Skills.
Barbs III
Support, Attack, Melee, Strike
Supports Melee Strike Skills. After you Retaliate with Thorns Damage, you also deal your Thorns damage twice to enemies you Hit with Supported Skills.
Rime
Support, Cold
Supports Skills which create Ground Surfaces, causing Enemies Chilled by those Surfaces to be more easily Frozen, but at the cost of some Chill magnitude.
Arms Length
Support
Supports Skills which Hit Enemies, causing Knockback from those Hits to be significantly more effective.
Charm Bounty
Support
Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing Enemies it kills to grant more Charm charges.
Thornskin I
Support, Buff, Persistent
Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Thorns Damage while the Supported Skill is active.
Thornskin II
Support, Buff, Persistent
Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Thorns Damage while the Supported Skill is active.
Mysticism I
Support, Buff, Persistent
Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Spell Damage while on full Energy Shield while the Supported Skill is active.
Mysticism II
Support, Buff, Persistent
Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Spell Damage while on full Energy Shield while the Supported Skill is active.
Direstrike I
Support, Buff, Persistent
Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Attack Damage while on Low Life while the Supported Skill is active.
Direstrike II
Support, Buff, Persistent
Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Attack Damage while on Low Life while the Supported Skill is active.
Upwelling I
Support, Buff, Persistent
Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing your Minions to deal increased Damage while you are not on full Mana while the Supported Skill is active.
Upwelling II
Support, Buff, Persistent
Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing your Minions to deal increased Damage while you are not on full Mana while the Supported Skill is active.
Warm Blooded
Support, Buff, Persistent
Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing Freeze applied to you to last for a shorter duration while the Supported Skill is active.
Cool Headed
Support, Buff, Persistent
Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing Ignite applied to you to last for a shorter duration while the Supported Skill is active.
Strong Hearted
Support, Buff, Persistent
Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing Shock applied to you to last for a shorter duration while the Supported Skill is active.
Untouchable
Support, Attack
Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. While using Supported Skills, you gain increased Evasion Rating, with the increase scaling higher the longer the Attack time of the supported Skill. Cannot Support Channelling Skills.
Refraction I
Support, Buff, Persistent
Supports Banner Skills, causing those affected by Auras they create to gain Refractive Plating, a Buff which grants Deflection Rating and causes Armour to partially apply to Elemental Hit Damage.
Refraction II
Support, Buff, Persistent
Supports Banner Skills, causing those affected by Auras they create to gain Refractive Plating, a Buff which grants Deflection Rating and causes Armour to partially apply to Elemental Hit Damage.
Refraction III
Support, Buff, Persistent
Supports Banner Skills, causing Enemies within their area to gain Refractive Dissolution, a Debuff which lowers Elemental Resistances.
Cirel's Cultivation
Support, Lineage, Totem
Supports Skills which create Totems, preventing you from having more than one of that Totem but granting significant benefits for Supported Totems based how many allied Totems are near them. Does not Support Skills used by Minions.
Greatwood II
Support, Totem
[DNT] Supports Skills which create Totems, limiting their active Totem count to one but granting significant benefits for supported Totems based how many allied Totems are near them. Does not support Skills used by Minions.
Splinter Totem I
Support, Totem
Supports Skills which create Totems, preventing having more than one active Totem but causing that Totem to splinter into smaller versions of itself after it uses an Attack or Spell, with each Totem becoming less effective. Each splintered Totem can further splinter, up to a maximum. Does not Support Skills used by Minions. Only one Totem can be splintering at a time.
Splinter Totem II
Support, Totem
Supports Skills which create Totems, preventing having more than one active Totem but causing that Totem to splinter into smaller versions of itself after it uses an Attack or Spell, with each Totem becoming less effective. Each splintered Totem can further splinter, up to a maximum. Does not Support Skills used by Minions. Only one Totem can be splintering at a time.
Unabating
Support, Attack
Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. While using Supported Skills, you gain increased Armour, with the increase scaling higher the longer the Attack time of the supported Skill. Cannot Support Channelling Skills.
[DNT-UNUSED] Timerot
Support, Buff
[DNT-UNUSED] Timerot
Punch Through
Support, Attack, Melee
Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills apply Easy Target when Knocking Back Enemies, causing the next Projectile Attack Hit they take to deal increased Damage.
Rip
Support, Attack, Melee, Physical, Duration, Remnant
Supports Melee Attack Skills you use or Trigger yourself. Killing Blows with Supported Skills on Bleeding enemies create a Blood Remnant. Blood Remnants increase your Life regeneration rate for a short while after being collected.
Tear
Support, Attack, Melee, Physical
Supports Melee Attacks you use or Trigger yourself. On-Kill effects caused by Killing Blows with Supported Skills on Bleeding enemies have a chance to occur twice.
Brink I
Support, Attack, Melee
Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills build up Heavy Stun more quickly, but cannot themselves Heavy Stun.
Brink II
Support, Attack, Melee
Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills build up Stun more quickly, but cannot themselves Stun.
Tireless
Support, Warcry
Supports Warcry Skills. Attacks Empowered by Supported Skills have a chance not to lower the Empowerment count of Supported Skills when they are used.
Volcanic Eruption
Support, Attack, AoE, Melee, Strike, Projectile, Trigger, Fire
Supports Melee Strike Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills trigger Volcanic Eruption on Hit against Ignited Enemies.
First Blood
Support, Attack, Physical
Supports Attacks. Supported Skills are far more likely to inflict Bleeding on Hitting full Life Enemies.
Frenzied Riposte
Support, Attack
Supports Attacks you use or Trigger yourself, causing them to Consume the Parried Debuff on Hit to grant you a Frenzy Charge. Cannot support Skills which already Consume the Parried Debuff.
Hobble
Support, Physical
Supports Skills that Hit Enemies, causing those Hits to Hobble Bleeding Enemies based on a portion of Physical Damage dealt.
Heightened Charges
Support
Supports any Skill that Consumes Charges, granting a chance for benefits of that Consumption to be doubled.
Incision
Support, Attack, Physical
Supports Attack Skills. Supported Skills inflict Incision on Hit, which causes Enemies to be increasingly more likely to be inflicted with Bleeding. All Incision is removed from a target on inflicting it with Bleeding.
Catharsis
Support, Physical, Chaos, Conditional
Supports any Skill you use yourself, causing supported Skill to detonate Volatility that is present on you. Supported Skill can only be used while you have a certain amount of Volatility and cannot support Skills which already have another Condition.
Delayed Gratification
Support
Supports Skills which require some Condition to be met for use. Supported Skills can be used an additional time after their Condition has been met, but meeting that Condition is harder.
Loyalty
Support, Minion
Supports Skills that create Companions which can be damaged. Minions created by Supported Skills take a portion of Hit Damage you would otherwise have taken, but have lowered maximum Life.
Romira's Requital
Support, Lineage, Minion
Supports Skills that create Companions which can be damaged. Minions created by Supported Skills take a portion of Hit Damage you would otherwise have taken, but have lowered maximum Life. A percentage of Damage taken this way is Recouped by you as Life.
Rearm I
Support, Hazard
Supports Skills which create Hazards. Hazards created by Supported Skills have a chance to be rearmed a short duration after triggering.
Rearm II
Support, Hazard
Supports Skills which create Hazards. Hazards created by Supported Skills have a chance to be rearmed a short duration after triggering.
Delayed Reaction
Support, Hazard
Supports Skills which create Hazards, causing those Hazards to only be able to trigger immediately after creation or at the end of their duration. Created Hazards have significantly lowered duration, and deal more damage.
[DNT-UNUSED] Spectral Palm
Support
[DNT-UNUSED] Spectral Palm
Volatile Power
Support, Physical, Chaos
Supports Skills which you use yourself. On using Supported Skills while they are Empowered, you gain Volatility.
Gambleshot
Support, Projectile
Supports Skills which fire Projectiles that are not ground targeted. Projectiles from Supported Skills randomly Fork, Chain or Pierce.
Unerring Power
Support, Attack
Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. When Supported Attacks are Empowered, they have significantly lowered cost and raised Accuracy.
Impale
Support, Attack, Physical
Supports Attacks, causing them to Impale on Hit but making them unable to Extract Impale themselves.
Perfection
Support
Supports skills which have a benefit for Perfectly Timing their use. On successfully executing Perfect Timing with Supported Skills, gain Perfection, which is a powerful damage buff. However, failing to execute any Perfect Timing (even with skills not supported by Perfection) will remove all Perfection on you.
Deliberation
Support
Supports skills that can be used while moving, causing you to move slower while using them, but granting more damage in exchange.
See Red
Support, Attack, Physical
Supports Attack Skills. Bleeding inflicted with Supported Skills lasts significantly longer, but enemies you inflict Bleeding onto with Supported Skills will move and Attack faster.
Short Fuse I
Support
Supports Skills which Detonate after some amount of time has elapsed, shortening the time before Detonation.
Short Fuse II
Support
Supports Skills which Detonate after some amount of time has elapsed, massively shortening the time before Detonation at the cost of Damage.
Undermine
Support, Physical
Supports Attack Skills. Supported Skills Consume Maim on hit, Breaking a percentage of the Maimed target's Armour in doing so. Supported Skills cannot themselves inflict Maim.
Outmaneuver
Support, Physical
Supports Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills Break Armour against Parried Enemies.
Mark for Death
Support, Mark, Physical
Supports Mark Skills. Enemies affected by Supported Marks will have their Armour Broken by Physical Damage they take.
Mark for Death II
Support, Mark, Physical
Supports Mark Skills. Enemies affected by Supported Marks will have their Armour Broken by Physical Damage they take.
[DNT] Tekaru's Snare
Support, Mark, Physical, Hazard
[DNT] Supports Mark Skills. Trigger Savage Snare when you Mark enemies with Supported Skills.
Tumult
Support, Physical
Supports Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills consume a Frenzy Charge on use to powerfully Break Armour.
Admixture
Support, Physical, Chaos
Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits. Bleeding inflicted by those Hits is more effective against Poisoned Enemies, and Poison inflicted by Supported Skills is more effective against Bleeding Enemies.
Stoicism I
Support
Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills steadily gain more Damage, up to a cap. This Damage bonus is reset if you Dodge Roll or use a Travel Skill.
Stoicism II
Support
Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills steadily gain more Damage, up to a cap. This Damage bonus is reset if you Dodge Roll or use a Travel Skill.
Relentless Rage
Support
Supports Skills you use yourself. On spending Rage with any skill you will gain a Buff. Using Supported Skills consumes this Buff to grant you Rage.
Brambleslam
Support, Attack, AoE, Melee, Slam, Trigger, Physical, Hazard, Plant
Supports Slam Skills. Supported Skills create Hazardous Brambles on the ground that activate after a duration. Enemies which come in contact with these thorns take damage and are Maimed. A maximum of 20 Brambles are allowed at one time. Does not modify Skills used by Minions or Totems.
Inhibitor
Support, Spell
Supports any Skill you use or Trigger yourself. Supported Skills cannot consume Charges or Infusion by any means. Cannot Support Skills which require Charges or Infusion to be used.
Static Shocks
Support, Spell, AoE, Trigger, Sustained, Lightning, Duration
Supports Skills which can Hit enemies. Shocking an enemy with Hits from Supported Skills Triggers Static Shocks, causing that enemy to become a source of Lightning damage sending pulses towards nearby enemies.
Hardy Totems I
Support, Totem
Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Totems to have more Life.
Hardy Totems II
Support, Totem
Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Totems to have more Life.
Tawhoa's Tending
Support, Lineage, Totem, AoE, Trigger, Physical
Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Totems to have more Life. Totems created by Supported Skills explode on death, dealing Physical damage based on their Life.
Encroaching Ground
Support, AoE
Supports Skills that create Ground Surfaces, causing those Surfaces to grow over time, up to a limit.
Living Lightning
Support, Minion, Trigger, Lightning, Duration
Supports Skills which cause Damaging Hits. Living Lightning Minions are created when dealing Lightning damage with Supported Skills - bundles of living electricity that target nearby enemies with Chaining Attacks. Enemies will not directly engage these Minions, and can pass through them. Does not modify skills used by Minions.
Living Lightning II
Support, Minion, Trigger, Lightning, Duration
Supports Skills which cause Damaging Hits. Living Lightning Minions are created when dealing Lightning damage with Supported Skills - bundles of living electricity that target nearby enemies with Chaining Attacks. Enemies will not directly engage these Minions, and can pass through them. Does not modify skills used by Minions.
[DNT] Stone Slam Aegis
Support
[DNT] Totemic Aegis
Support, Attack, AoE, Melee, Trigger, Physical, Duration
[DNT] Totemic Aegis
[DNT] From the Grave
Support, Minion, AoE, Projectile, Trigger, Cold
[DNT] From the Grave Support
Frozen Spite
Support, AoE, Projectile, Trigger, Cold
Supports Attack Skills, causing them to create Ice Fragments on killing Frozen Enemies. Cannot Support Totem Skills and does not modify Skills used by Minions.
Electromagnetism
Support, Spell, AoE, Trigger, Sustained, Lightning, Payoff
Supports Skills that Hit enemies. When Supported Skills Shock an enemy that is nearby other Shocked enemies, trigger Electromagnetism, sucking in nearby enemies, Hindering them, and dealing Lightning damage at an interval.
Dominus' Grasp
Support, Lineage, Projectile, Chaining
Supports Projectile skills and any other skills that Chain, causing them to Chain more times.
Flame Pillar
Support, AoE, Trigger, Fire
Supports any Skill you use yourself which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills Consume Ignite on Hit to create pillars of flame, but cannot themselves inflict Ignite. Cannot Support Skills which already Consume Ignite, and does not modify the Skills of Minions.
Streamlined Rounds
Support, Ammunition, Projectile
Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills. Supported Skills have significantly higher Attack speed and bolt capacity, but deal less damage and have longer reload time.
Perfected Endurance
Support, Channelling
Supports skills which have a benefit for Perfect Timing. Supported Skills grant at least one Endurance Charge when Hitting an enemy with Perfect Timing.
Enduring Impact I
Support
Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to gain an Endurance Charge when causing a Heavy Stun.
Enduring Impact II
Support
Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to gain an Endurance Charge when causing a Heavy Stun.
Crater
Support, Attack, AoE, Melee, Trigger, Fire, Duration
Supports Melee Skills that leap into the air, causing them to create Fissures when you land. Cannot Support Totem Skills, and does not modify Skills used by Minions.
Vanguard I
Support
Supports Shield Skills, causing you to gain Guard on Stunning Enemies with the Supported Skill.
Vanguard II
Support
Supports Shield Skills, causing you to gain Guard on Stunning Enemies with the Supported Skill.
Crystalline Shards
Support
Supports Skills which create Ice Crystals. Damaging Explosions caused by Ice Crystals from Supported Skills will Impale Enemies.
Skittering Stone I
Support, Minion, Trigger, Physical, Duration
Supports Skills which create shatterable earthen objects. After killing enough Enemies in range of these objects, they will shatter, releasing skittering stone Minions.
Skittering Stone II
Support, Minion, Trigger, Physical, Duration
Supports Skills which create shatterable earthen objects. After killing enough Enemies in range of these objects, they will shatter, releasing skittering stone Minions.
Dialla's Desire
Support, Lineage
Supports any Skill which has levels, increasing the level and Quality, while reducing the cost and Reservation.
Kalisa's Crescendo
Support, Lineage
Supports Curse Skills. Enemies Cursed by Supported Skills are Pacified for the final portion of the Supported Curse's duration.
Durability
Support
Supports Skills which create objects that are destroyed after being Hit a number of times, allowing for them to last for additional Hits. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.
Xoph's Pyre
Support, Lineage, Fire, Chaos
Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Ignites.
Esh's Radiance
Support, Lineage, Lightning, Chaos
Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Shock.
Tul's Stillness
Support, Lineage, Cold, Chaos
Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Freeze Buildup.
Uul-Netol's Embrace
Support, Lineage, Physical, Chaos
Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Break Armour.
Rakiata's Flow
Support, Lineage
Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, causing those Hits to treat Enemy Elemental Resistances as inverted.
Rigwald's Ferocity
Support, Lineage, Attack
Supports Attack skills, granting them Attack Speed at the cost of Damage or Damage at the cost of Attack Speed depending on Weapon Set they are used in. Does not modify skills used by Minions.
Uhtred's Exodus
Support, Lineage
Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them many additional levels provided no other supports are used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.
Uhtred's Omen
Support, Lineage
Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them additional levels provided exactly one other support is used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.
Uhtred's Augury
Support, Lineage
Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them additional levels provided exactly two other supports are used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.
Daresso's Passion
Support, Banner, Lineage
Supports Banner Skills, causing them to require significantly less Glory to use.
Atziri's Allure
Support, Lineage, Curse
Supports Curse Spells you cast yourself, causing those Curses to ignore the usual Curse Limit, but be reflected back to you when inflicted.
Atziri's Call
Support, Lineage, Spell, AoE, Trigger
[DNT] Supports Spells you use yourself which Hit enemies. On Critical Hit with supported Spells, Trigger Atziri's Storm at the location of the nearest enemy.
Atziri's Communion
Support, Lineage, Persistent
Supports Persistent Skills, making them Reserve Life instead of Spirit.
Atziri's Impatience
Support, Lineage
Supports Skills you use yourself that have Cooldowns, dramatically increasing the rate at which those Cooldowns Recover, but causing you to lose Life, Mana, and Energy Shield when they are used. Cannot Support Meta Skills or Persistent Skills, or modify the Skills of Minions.
Tacati's Ire
Support, Lineage, Chaos
Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits. Poison inflicted with Supported Skills deals Damage faster the higher your Rage.
Zarokh's Refrain
Support, Lineage, Spell, AoE
Supports Cascadable Spells you cast yourself. Supported Spells Echo thrice, but are given a Cooldown. Cannot support skills which already have a Cooldown.
Garukhan's Resolve
Support, Lineage, Attack, Conditional
Supports Attack Skills you use yourself which do not already have some Condition for use. Supported Skills have a maximum Critical Hit chance, but will Bifurcate Critical Hit Chance.
Kurgal's Leash
Support, Lineage, Minion, Chaos
Supports Commandable Minions causing you and the Supported Minion to gain Unholy Might when you Command them.
Kulemak's Dominion
Support, Lineage
Supports Offering Skills, causing your Cascadable Spells to Cascade to the locations of Supported Offerings.
Amanamu's Tithe
Support, Lineage, Minion, Persistent
Supports Persistent Minion Skills, granting a chance when Supported Minions die for you to gain an Abyssal Monster Modifier.
Varashta's Blessing
Support, Lineage
Supports any Skill that can deal damage, causing it to deal more damage for each different Command Skill you have used in the past few seconds. Cannot modify the Skills of Minions.
Arbiter's Ignition
Support, Lineage, Spell, Fire
Supports Fire Spell Skills causing you to gain Elemental Archon when Igniting with them.
Arakaali's Lust
Support, Lineage
Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to deal increasingly higher damage the more Poisons are on the target.
Dreamer's Knell
Support, Lineage, Attack, AoE, Melee, Trigger, Duration
[DNT-UNUSED] Ezomyte Four
Tasalio's Rhythm
Support, Lineage
Supports Skills which have a benefit for Perfectly Timing their use. On successfully executing Perfect Timing with Supported Skills, gain Tasalio's Rhythm. Tasalio's Rhythm causes Supported Skills to deal more damage and have shorter Perfect Timing windows for each stack. Failing to execute any Perfect Timing (even with skills not supported by Tasalio's Rhythm) will remove all Tasalio's Rhythm on you.
Xibaqua's Rending
Support, Lineage, AoE, Trigger, Fire
Supports Skills that leap into the air, causing Corpses in the area you land to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies.
Khatal's Rejuvenation
Support, Lineage, Remnant
Supports Skills that generate Remnants. Picking up Remnants from Supported Skills grants Khatal's Rejuvenation.
[DNT] Tangmazu Lineage
Support, Lineage, Buff, Persistent
[DNT] Tangmazu Lineage
Morgana's Tempest
Support, Lineage, Storm
Supports Storm skills, increasing their Limit and causing them to move quickly from the user to the target location, but become less effective. Cannot Support Triggered Skills.
Creeping Chill
Support, AoE, Trigger, Cold
Supports any Skill that creates Ice Crystals, causing that Skill to Consume a Power Charge if possible to create Chilled Ground around the Crystal.
Mark of Siphoning
Support, Mark
Supports Mark Skills, causing enemies they Mark to Leech Mana to you when you Hit them with Attacks.
Mark of Siphoning II
Support, Mark
Supports Mark Skills, causing enemies they Mark to Leech Life and Mana to you when you Hit them with Attacks.
Thrill of the Kill
Support, Attack, Lightning, Duration
Supports Skills you use yourself which Hit enemies. Culling a Shocked enemy with Supported Skills infuses all of your Attacks with Lightning damage for a short time.
Thrill of the Kill II
Support, Attack, Lightning, Duration
Supports Skills you use yourself which Hit enemies. Culling a Shocked enemy with Supported Skills infuses all of your Attacks with Lightning damage and grants an increased chance to Shock for a short time.
Exposing Cry
Support, Warcry, Duration
Supports Warcries. Supported Skills apply Exposure on Hitting enemies.
Opening Move
Support
Supports Travel Skills which Hit enemies. Hits with Supported Skills against enemies on full life will Daze.
Accelerated Growth
Support, Spell, AoE, Trigger, Plant
Supports Plant Skills, causing them to Trigger an explosion after they have been Overgrown.
Accelerated Growth II
Support, Spell, AoE, Trigger, Plant
Supports Plant Skills, causing them to Trigger an explosion after they have been Overgrown, Blinding enemies Hit.
Fan The Flames
Support, Attack, AoE, Trigger, Fire
Supports Wind Skills which Hit enemies. Hits with Supported Skills against Ignited enemies Trigger a fiery explosion, dealing damage to that enemy and enemies in a cone behind them.
Fan The Flames II
Support, Attack, AoE, Trigger, Fire
Supports Wind Skills which Hit enemies. Hits with Supported Skills against Ignited enemies Trigger a fiery explosion, dealing damage to that enemy and enemies in a cone behind them. The explosion Spreads the initial enemy's Ignite to other enemies Hit.
Coursing Current
Support, Spell, Projectile, Trigger, Lightning, Chaining
Supports Skills which Hit enemies. Shocking an enemy with Supported Skills Triggers Coursing Current, which sends Chaining Lightning Projectiles to nearby Drenched enemies.
Poison Spores
Support, Attack, Buff, AoE, Trigger, Physical, Chaos, Duration, Plant
Supports Plant Skills which Hit enemies. Supported Skills Trigger Toxic Pustule on Hitting an enemy.
Hayoxi's Fulmination
Support, Lineage, Spell, AoE, Trigger, Physical, Lightning, Cold, Fire, Chaos, Curse
Supports Curse Skills, giving them a short cooldown but causing them to create areas which Curse enemies so long as they are within them. Cursed areas from Supported Skills gather power before erupting in a column of annihilating light after a moderate delay.
Zerphi's Infamy
Support, Lineage, Warcry
Supports Attacks and Warcries you use yourself. Supported Skills gain a Glory requirement, and build Glory when you spend Life on Skills. Supported Skills deal more damage and have significantly increased area of effect.
Helbrym's Hide
Support, Lineage, Shapeshift, Buff
Supports Shapeshifting Skills, causing them to grant Helbrym's Composure for a brief duration when they cause you to Shapeshift. Shapeshifting into a different form before the Buff expires causes it to be removed without effect.
Deadly Resolve
Support, Attack, AoE, Trigger, Physical, Channelling, Staged
Supports Channelling Skills you use yourself. While Channelling Supported Skills, periodically gain stages of Deadly Resolve. Expend a stage of Deadly Resolve when an enemy Hits you to Trigger a deadly slash towards that enemy, dealing more damage based on your Armour.
Advancing Storm
Support, Storm
Supports Storm skills, causing them to appear at the user's location and move towards the target location.
Echoing Cry
Support, Warcry, AoE, Conditional
Supports Warcries. Supported Skills Echo twice, and their area grows larger each time, but are less effective and require you to have travelled a certain distance before use.
Gorge
Support
Supports skills that consume Corpses. Consuming Corpses with supported skills grants Flask charges.
Empowered Sparks I
Support, Projectile, Trigger, Lightning, Duration
Supports Skills which generate Charges. When generating Power Charge with Supported Skills, Empower some of your Attacks to Trigger Spark Projectiles on use.
Empowered Sparks II
Support, Projectile, Trigger, Lightning, Duration
Supports Skills which generate Charges. When generating Power Charge with Supported Skills, Empower some of your Attacks to Trigger Spark Projectiles on use.
Controlled Hazard
Support, Hazard
Supports Skills which create Hazards, causing those Hazards to be unable to be triggered for 3 seconds after being created.
Brittle Armour
Support, Physical, Cold
Supports Skills which can Hit enemies. Hits with Supported Skills which Freeze enemies cause Physical damage against them to Break their Armour while they remain Frozen.
Rending Apex
Support, Attack, Melee, Strike
Supports Strikes that perform a Final Strike at the end of a combination of attacks, causing the Final Strike to Break Armour based on a portion of Attack damage dealt.
Practical Magic I
Support, Spell, Duration
Supports Skills which Hit enemies. Heavy Stunning an enemy with Supported Skills increases your Spell damage for a duration.
Practical Magic II
Support, Spell, Duration
Supports Skills which Hit enemies. Heavy Stunning an enemy with Supported Skills increases your Spell damage for a duration.
Blazing Critical
Support, Attack, Fire, Duration
Supports Skills you use yourself which Hit enemies. Critical Hits with Supported Skills imbue all of your Attacks with Fire damage for a duration.
Concussive Spells
Support, Spell, Physical
Supports Spells which Hit enemies. Supported Skills Daze on Critically Hitting enemies with Physical damage.
Eternal Mark
Support, Mark
Supports Mark Skills, causing them to not be Consumed the first time they are Activated.
Catalysing Elements
Support, Spell, AoE, Trigger, Lightning, Cold, Fire
Supports Skills which are boosted by Elemental Ground Surfaces, Triggering Catalysing Discharge of the corresponding type when they are boosted by an allied Elemental Ground Surface.
Nova Projectiles II
Support, Projectile
Supports Projectile Skills, making them fire extra Projectiles in a circle, at the cost of Damage and gaining a cooldown. Does not Support Skills which rain down Projectiles from above. Cannot Support Skills which already have a cooldown.
Charged Mark
Support, Spell, AoE, Trigger, Mark, Duration
Supports Mark Skills, causing them to Trigger Charged Mark when they are Activated. Charged Mark creates Shocked Ground at the target's location.
Minion Splash I
Support, Attack, Minion, Melee, Strike
Supports Skills which create Minions which Strike, causing those Minions' Strikes to have Melee Splash.
Minion Splash II
Support, Attack, Minion, Melee, Strike
Supports Skills which create Minions which Strike, increasing their Area of Effect and causing those Minions' Strikes to have Melee Splash.
Her Declaration
Support, Lineage, Buff, Persistent
Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing enemies that enter your Presence to become Intimidated while the Skill is active.
Prototype Seventeen
Support, Lineage
Supports non-Channelling skill you use yourself that Hits enemies, causing it to gain Critical Hit chance based on Rage, but also remove all Rage upon Critically Hitting.
Seraph's Heart
Support, Lineage, Buff, Persistent
Supports Persistent Buff Skills, providing a chance for enemies to calculate their Hits as though your Resistances were 90% while the skill is active.
[DNT] Arbiters Calling
Support, Lineage
[DNT] Description
Uhtred's Rite
Support, Lineage, Duration
Supports skills with Cooldowns, causing them to grant Overflowing Chalice when used. Supported skills deal more damage during the effect of your Life Flask and have increased Mana Cost Efficiency during the effect of your Mana Flask.
[DNT] Wendigos Authority
Support, Lineage
[DNT] Description
Trickster's Shard
Support, Lineage, Spell, AoE, Trigger, Duration
Supports non-instant Spells you cast yourself. Supported Spells will Trigger Fragment Self, creating a Fractured Mimic which will cast that Spell if you get enough of them.
Arbiter's Reach
Support, Lineage, Buff, Persistent, Duration
Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you periodically grant Guard to allies in your Presence while the Skill is active.
Tangmazu's Thurible
Support, Lineage, Minion, Persistent
Supports Skills which summon Companions causing them to be Gigantic and gain Evasion and Deflection based on your own.
[DNT] Wendigo's Pareidolia
Support, Lineage
[DNT] Description
Esh's Prowess
Support, Lineage, Lightning
Supports Lightning skills that Hit targets, granting them an additional level and causing them to only roll the minimum or maximum value for Lightning damage. Does not support skills which do not have levels.
Breachlord's Rift
Support, Lineage, Lightning, Cold
Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to Break Armour of enemies it Freezes or Electrocutes.
Breachlord's Amalgam
Support, Lineage, Projectile, Lightning, Cold
Supports Lightning or Cold skills you use yourself which fire Projectiles and do not already have cooldowns, adding a cooldown and making the Projectiles return, piercing through targets as they do so.
Vruun's Aftermath
Support, Lineage, Warcry
Supports Warcries, causing them to destroy Ice Crystals and Ice Fragments. Supported Skills empower additional Attacks if they destroy enough Ice Crystals and Ice Fragments.
Vruun's Inevitability
Support, Lineage, Attack, Melee, Conditional
Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills gain Combo when you successfully Strike Enemies with other Melee Attacks. Supported Skills expend their Combo when used, gaining more area of effect the higher Combo they had. Cannot support skills which already gain Combo. Cannot modify the Skills of Minions.
Uhtred's Constellation
Support, Lineage
Supports non-instant skills which have a cooldown, granting them two additional cooldown uses and more damage per different skill with a cooldown you have used recently.
Medved's Felling
Support, Lineage, Attack, Melee
Supports Melee Attacks you use yourself, causing them to attack faster the more Rage you have and grant Rage on Hit, but also making you lose Life based on your Rage when using them.
Vorana's Siege
Support, Lineage, AoE
Supports skills which Hit targets and have an area of effect, increasing the affected area and causing it to Hit Isolated targets harder.
[DNT] Vorana's Touch
Support, Lineage
[DNT] Description
Styrn's Mountain
Support, Lineage
Supports Skills that Raise your Shield causing your other melee skills to deal more damage if you block.
Styrn's Ferocity
Support, Lineage, Physical
Supports Shield Skills that Hit enemies, causing those Hits to Crush their targets, additionally causing any Physical Damage Hits against those targets while Crushed to Break their Armour.
Styrn's Anthem
Support, Lineage
[DNT] Description
Catha's Brilliance
Support, Lineage, Minion, AoE, Fire
Supports skills which create Companions, causing enemies near them to be Blinded and Ignited. The damage of the Ignite is based on the Life of the supported Minion.
Mórrigan's Insight
Support, Lineage, Trigger, Cold, Duration, Payoff
Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to deal more damage and trigger Nature's Exchange when consuming Freeze on enemies. Cannot support skills that Consume Freeze.
[DNT] Mhacha's Guidance
Support, Lineage
[DNT] Description
[DNT] Greybeard's Fuse
Support, Lineage
[DNT] Description
Tul's Avalanche
Support, Lineage, Spell, AoE
Supports Cascadable Spells you cast yourself, Sealing them when you Block, The Seals are broken when used, each making the Spell Echo. Cannot support skills with a Cooldown or which already gain Seals.
Concussive Runes
Support, Attack, AoE, Melee, Slam, Trigger
Supports Attacks, causing a Runic Shockwave to erupt under enemies they Heavy Stun. The Shockwave costs Runic Ward, and will not Trigger if you do not have enough Runic Ward.
Runic Infusion
Support, Attack, Physical
Supports Attacks you use or Trigger yourself, causing them to cost Runic Ward to use but deal additional Physical damage based on their Runic Ward cost. Cannot Support Channelling Skills, Sustained Skills, or Skills without a cost.
Runeforged Blades
Support, Attack, Projectile, Trigger, Payoff
Supports Attacks you use yourself, causing them to Consume Fully Broken Armour on enemies to fire a nova of runic Projectiles at the cost of Runic Ward. The Projectiles cannot Hit the enemy from which they originated. Cannot support skills that Consume Broken Armour.
Runic Extraction
Support, Remnant
Supports any Skill that deals damage. Enemies you kill with supported Skills have a chance to drop a Verisium Infusion Remnant.
Scouring Flame
Support, Fire
Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing inflicted Ignites to deal more damage but the skill to gain a Runic Ward cost.
Fist Of Kalguur
Support, Attack, AoE, Melee, Slam, Trigger, Physical, Duration
Supports Slams you use yourself, allowing them to spend large amounts of Runic Ward to become Runically Boosted. Runically Boosted Slams are Empowered with extra Physical damage and create a rune the first time they hit an enemy. The rune erupts in an Aftershock after a duration. Cannot support Channelling Skills.
Healing Runes
Support, Buff, Persistent
Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to lose Runic Ward and heal nearby allies based on the Ward lost. Healing done is split between allies who are not on full Life.
Olroth's Conviction
Support, Lineage
Supports skills that can Empower a specific number of other skills, causing them to apply to more skill uses.
Olroth's Hubris
Support, Lineage
Supports Attacks you use or Trigger yourself, causing them to cost Runic Ward to use but deal additional Physical and Cold damage based on their Runic Ward cost, in addition to causing Physical damage to Contribute to Freeze buildup. Cannot Support Channelling Skills, Sustained Skills, or Skills without a cost.
Support Gems All Gems /5
TierGems

2
3
4
5
SupportGem Ref /14
Support Gems
Support Gems can be inserted into sockets on a Skill Gem in order to modify the effects of that Skill. They only apply to the Skill Gem they are socketed into.

You cannot use multiple copies of the exact same Lineage Support across multiple Skills, or for Supports that grant global benefits to persistent reservation Skills while active.
Cannot use multiple Support Gems of the same Category in one Skill.
Solus Ipse Grand Visage
Requires: Level 65, 36 Str, 36 Dex, 36 Int
(150—200)% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield
+(60—100) to maximum Mana
25% increased Light Radius
Equipment and Skill Gems have 25% increased Attribute Requirements
You can Socket 2 additional copies of each Lineage Support Gem, in different Skills
Crystalline Resistance
Liquid Emotions: Isolation, Fear, Despair
+1% to all Maximum Elemental Resistances if you have at
least 5 Red, Green and Blue Support Gems Socketed
Gem Enthusiast
Liquid Emotions: Isolation, Greed, Suffering
5% increased Maximum Life if you have at least 10 Red Support Gems Socketed
5% increased Maximum Mana if you have at least 10 Blue Support Gems Socketed
5% increased Movement Speed if you have at least 10 Green Support Gems Socketed
Crystallised Immunities
Liquid Emotions: Isolation, Isolation, Suffering
Immune to Chill if a majority of your Socketed Support Gems are Blue
Immune to Ignite if a majority of your Socketed Support Gems are Red
Immune to Shock if a majority of your Socketed Support Gems are Green
Unnatural Resilience
Liquid Emotions: Isolation, Isolation, Isolation
+3% to all Elemental Resistances
+2% to Maximum Fire Resistance if you have at least 5 Red Support Gems Socketed
Conductive Embrace
Liquid Emotions: Paranoia, Isolation, Guilt
+10% to Lightning Resistance
+2% to Maximum Lightning Resistance if you have at least 5 Green Support Gems Socketed
Unbothering Cold
Liquid Emotions: Fear, Isolation, Paranoia
+10% to Cold Resistance
+2% to Maximum Cold Resistance if you have at least 5 Blue Support Gems Socketed
Integrated Efficiency
Ascendancy: Gemling Legionnaire
Character: Mercenary
Skills deal 20% increased Damage per Connected Red Support Gem
Skills have 6% increased Skill Speed per Connected Green Support Gem
Skills have 20% increased Critical Hit Chance per Connected Blue Support Gem
Thaumaturgical Infusion
Ascendancy: Gemling Legionnaire
Character: Mercenary
+1% to Maximum Cold Resistance per 3 Blue Support Gems Socketed
+1% to Maximum Fire Resistance per 3 Red Support Gems Socketed
+1% to Maximum Lightning Resistance per 3 Green Support Gems Socketed
Meta Gems
Meta Gems are Skill Gems that other Skill Gems can be socketed into. They can use, Trigger, or otherwise apply the effects of those other Skill Gems. Skill Gems and Support Gems can be socketed into Meta Gems interchangeably, though most Meta Gems require at least one Skill Gem to be socketed to function.

Meta Gems can never be socketed into other Meta Gems.
Support Gem Categories
Every Support Gem falls into one or more Categories. Support Gems from the same Category cannot be socketed into the same skill simultaneously, but can be used across multiple skills.
Lineage Supports
Lineage Supports are powerful and transformative Support Gems which can drop in maps, or come from specific sources like a particular Boss.

You may only Socket one copy of any given Lineage Support across all of your Skills at once.
Default Attack Damage
Your Default Attack Damage is the expected damage of a Default Attack, and is determined by the damage of your Weapon and an Attack Damage scaling value based on your character level.

Your Default Attacks will always deal Default Attack Damage unless modifiers are applied to change their damage or skill level.

Some Attack skills provided by Support Gems do not determine their Attack Damage scaling from skill level, but instead deal a percentage of Default Attack Damage.
Connected Support Gems
Two gems are considered Connected if one is socketed into the other, or if both are socketed into a third gem.

A Support Gem socketed in a Meta Skill is still Connected to that Meta Skill and to all other Skills socketed in that Meta Skill, even if it cannot Support some of those skills.
